hero.subtitle: A zero-knowledge DSL with dual execution — run your code in a full VM or compile it to arithmetic circuits. Same syntax, two targets.

dual.title: Dual Execution
dual.desc: VM mode for the full language — closures, recursion, GC, collections. Circuit mode compiles to R1CS or Plonkish constraints.

proofs.title: Inline Proofs
proofs.desc: prove {} blocks compile circuits, capture witnesses, and generate Groth16 or PlonK proofs — all inline, as first-class values.

native.title: Native Provers
native.desc: Groth16 (ark-groth16) and PlonK (halo2 KZG) run in-process. No Node.js, no snarkjs, no external dependencies.

security.title: Security Analysis
security.desc: Taint tracking and under-constraint detection at compile time. Catches circuit bugs before proof generation.

snarkjs.title: snarkjs Compatible
snarkjs.desc: Export .r1cs and .wtns files. Generate Solidity verifier contracts with --solidity. Works with the snarkjs ecosystem.

open.title: Open Source
open.desc: GPL-3.0 licensed. 1,000+ tests passing, 2 security audits completed. Built with Rust for performance and safety.
